rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, as evidenced by the reorganized passage and explicit flags on unverified claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrated by the hedged language in the revised passage and the 'Flags on things I could not verify' section.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope creep observed.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, as the agent's revisions introduce some minor changes in tone and wording that may not be entirely neutral.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, as shown by the 'What I changed and why' section.
